zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de la Pomeraie於大約1147年出生在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易時，他的父親Henry (Baron) de la Pomerai I38歲，母親Rohese Fitzroy Princess34歲。他於大約1164年與Matilda (Maud) de Vitre在英國英格蘭戴文結婚。他們至少是3個兒子的父母。他去世於1193年在他的家鄉享年47歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de la Pomeraie于大约1147年出生在英国英格兰戴文貝里 波梅洛易时，他的父亲Henry (Baron) de la Pomerai I38岁，母亲Rohese Fitzroy Princess34岁。他于大约1164年与Matilda (Maud) de Vitre在英国英格兰戴文结婚。他们至少是3个儿子的父母。他去世于1193年在他的家乡享年47岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de la Pomeraie was born about 1147, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry (Baron) de la Pomerai I, was 38 and his mother, Rohese Fitzroy Princess, was 34. He married Matilda (Maud) de Vitre about 1164, in Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons. He died in 1193, in his hometown, at the age of 47.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de la Pomeraie est né environ 1147, à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry (Baron) de la Pomerai I, avait 38 ans et sa mère, Rohese Fitzroy Princess, avait 34 ans. Il a épousé Matilda (Maud) de Vitre environ 1164, à Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils. Il est décédé en 1193, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 47 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de la Pomeraie um 1147 in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry (Baron) de la Pomerai I 38 und seine Mutter Rohese Fitzroy Princess 34. Er hat um 1164 in Devon, England, United Kingdom Matilda (Maud) de Vitre geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne. Er starb 1193 im Alter von 47 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de la Pomeraie è nato il circa 1147 nel Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry (Baron) de la Pomerai I, aveva 38 anni e il suo madre, Rohese Fitzroy Princess, aveva 34 anni. Lui sposato Matilda (Maud) de Vitre circa 1164, nel Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli. Morì nel 1193, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 47 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de la Pomeraieが約1147年にイギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイで生まれた時，父Henry (Baron) de la Pomerai Iは38歳，母Rohese Fitzroy Princessは34歳であった。約1164年にイギリスイギリスデボンでMatilda (Maud) de Vitreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子の親であった。彼は1193年に故郷で47歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de la Pomeraie(이)가 대략 1147년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry (Baron) de la Pomerai I(은)는 38세였고, 그의 어머니 Rohese Fitzroy Princess(은)는 34세였다. 그는 대략 1164년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰에서 Matilda (Maud) de Vitre(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1193년 그의 고향에서 47세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de la Pomeraie nasceu aproximadamente 1147, em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry (Baron) de la Pomerai I, tinha 38 anos e sua mãe, Rohese Fitzroy Princess, tinha 34 anos. Ele casou-se com Matilda (Maud) de Vitre aproximadamente 1164, em Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos. Ele faleceu em 1193, em sua cidade natal, com 47 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de la Pomeraie родился около 1147 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry (Baron) de la Pomerai I было 38 лет, а матери, которую звали Rohese Fitzroy Princess, 34. Он женился на женщине по имени Matilda (Maud) de Vitre около 1164 г. в местности девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына. Он умер в 1193 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 47 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Henry de la Pomeraie nació aproximadamente 1147, en Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry (Baron) de la Pomerai I, tenía 38 años y su mamá, Rohese Fitzroy Princess, tenía 34 años. Se casó con Matilda (Maud) de Vitre aproximadamente 1164, en Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos. Murió en 1193, en su pueblo, a la edad de 47 años.
